clientApplication.title: What can we help you with today?
clientApplication.subtitle: Confirm what you’re interested in and then we’ll need some information
clientApplication.bankingDescription: Grow your business faster with bespoke account tools
clientApplication.fundingDescription: Funding for marketing, inventory or hiring

UNSUPPORTED_CANADA_PROVINCE.title: Province not currently supported
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We are unable to provide funding as we don’t currently operate in the following Canadian provinces: {{unsupportedProvinces}}.
If you have entities in other provinces please re-apply for funding.

UNSUPPORTED_US_STATE.title: State not currently supported
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We are unable to provide funding as we don’t currently operate in the following states: {{unsupportedStates}}.
If you have entities in other states please re-apply for funding.

SOLE_TRADER.title: Sole Proprietorship (sole trader) not supported
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We don’t currently work with Sole Proprietorships.
If this changes or if you think we’ve made a mistake; please re-apply for funding.

UNSUPPORTED_COUNTRY.title: Country not supported
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We currently only operate in the UK, USA, Canada and Poland.
If you have entities within these countries please re-apply for funding.

LOW_REVENUE.title: Minimum monthly revenue amount not met
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We are unable to provide funding to businesses with under {{minimumRequiredRevenue}} monthly revenue.
Once you meet our minimum amount, or think we’ve made a mistake? Please re-apply for funding.

UNSUPPORTED_BUSINESS_TYPE.title: Business type not supported
content: Unfortunately there are some limits to who we can support. We currently only lend to Ecommerce brands and Amazon sellers.
Have we made a mistake? Please re-apply for funding.

eligibleBallparkOffer.title: You’re eligible for up to
eligibleBallparkOffer.copy: This amount is based on the data you have provided so far. Your full offer will be subject to the rest of your application.

soleTraderOptions.yesHelpText: Select this if you are an individual operating a business and have not registered it as an LLC, Corporation or LLP

businessWebsiteHints.amazon: Include your Amazon store name (e.g. amazon.com/shops/yourstore). <href>Learn how to find your store name</href>
businessWebsiteHints.shopify: Include your Shopify store name (e.g. yourstore.myshopify.com). <href>Learn how to find your store name</href>
businessWebsiteHints.ebay: Include your Ebay store name (e.g. ebay.com/str/yourstore). <href>Learn how to find your store name</href>
